prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for LOW over the past year were used to estimate an average daily drift of approximately 0.032% and an annualized volatility of about 22% (equivalent to a daily standard deviation of 1.39%). These parameters were then projected forward 21 trading days (approximately 3 calendar weeks) to calculate the point estimate (mean of log-normal distribution) and confidence intervals, assuming a log-normal price distribution.
